CREATE TABLE vectors (vec Tuple(Float32, Float32, Float32));
SELECT LinfNorm((SELECT vec FROM vectors LIMIT 1));
CREATE TABLE additional_vectors (id UInt32, vec Array(Float32));
SELECT LinfNorm(vec) FROM additional_vectors WHERE id = 2;
SELECT LinfNorm((SELECT vec FROM additional_vectors WHERE id = 1));
SELECT LinfNorm((SELECT vec FROM (SELECT vec FROM additional_vectors WHERE id = 3) t));
SELECT LinfNorm((3, 4, (SELECT MAX(y) FROM (SELECT vec FROM additional_vectors) t2)));
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vectors) AS vector_count SELECT LinfNorm((1, 2)) WHERE vector_count > 0;
SELECT LinfNorm((SELECT max(abs(x)) FROM (SELECT x FROM vectors))) AS max_abs_vector;
